title: vittadinia constricta
intro: Vittadinia constricta is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the narrow-leaved vittadinia or yellow buttons. This plant has been found to have potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Vittadinia constricta include its use in treating skin irritations, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Vittadinia constricta may include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
